# Gospel Detailing

> Mobile car detailing company headquartered in McDonough, Georgia, serving Henry, Clayton, Fayette, Rockdale, and Spalding counties across South Metro Atlanta. Faith-driven, eco-friendly, and 100% mobile — we bring the detail to your home or office.

## Business Facts
- Legal name: Gospel Detailing LLC
- Owner / Founder: Matthew Gaudry
- Phone: (404) 594-9262
- Email: info@gospeldetailing.com
- Address: 300 Highway 81 W, McDonough, GA 30252 (Henry County) — this is our headquarters and primary service area
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9 AM–6 PM. Closed Sunday.
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gospel_detailingllc
- Service area: McDonough (home base), Stockbridge, Locust Grove, Hampton, Jonesboro, Fayetteville, Peachtree City, Conyers, Griffin, Forest Park, and the wider South Metro Atlanta area.

## Services & Pricing (USD)
- Full Detailing: $100–$200 — exterior hand clean, full interior vacuum, wheel clean & shine, window/mirror cleaning, protective ceramic spray.
- Basic Wash: $50–$100 — interior vacuum, eco-friendly exterior wash.
- Carpet Shampoo (add-on): $50
- Seat Shampoo (add-on): $50
- Headlight Restoration (add-on): $30
- Paint Correction (add-on): quote on request
- Ceramic Coating (add-on): quote on request
- Weekly membership: $60 per visit
- Bi-Weekly membership: $80 per visit
- Monthly membership: $100 per visit
- Referral reward: refer a friend and receive a Full Detailing for $100 flat, regardless of quoted price.

## About
Gospel Detailing is a faith-driven mobile detailing business founded by Matthew Gaudry. The company's tagline is "Delivering Good News," reflecting its emphasis on honest pricing, quality workmanship, and treating customers well. Every job starts with a walk-around and an upfront quote before work begins. Gospel Detailing is a new business (est. 2026) still building its review history.

## Pages
- [Homepage](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/): full overview of services, pricing, membership plans, service area, FAQ, and contact details.
- [About](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/about.html): founder story and company values.
- [Pricing](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/pricing.html): full pricing and membership plans.
- [FAQ](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/faq.html): comprehensive frequently asked questions.
- [Gallery](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/gallery.html): before/after photos and vehicle showcase.
- [Contact](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/contact.html): contact details and directions.
- [Service Area](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/service-area.html): full list of cities and counties served.
- [Car Care Tips](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/car-care-tips.html): educational article on vehicle care in Georgia's climate.
- [Reviews](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/reviews.html): current review status and how to leave a review.

### Services
- [Full Detailing](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/full-detailing.html)
- [Basic Wash](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/basic-wash.html)
- [Ceramic Coating](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/ceramic-coating.html)
- [Paint Correction](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/paint-correction.html)
- [Headlight Restoration](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/headlight-restoration.html)
- [Carpet & Seat Shampoo](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/interior-shampoo.html)
- [Membership Plans](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/membership.html)
- [Carpet Shampoo](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/carpet-shampoo.html): $50 add-on.
- [Seat Shampoo](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/seat-shampoo.html): $50 add-on.
- [Weekly Membership](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/weekly-membership.html): $60/visit.
- [Bi-Weekly Membership](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/biweekly-membership.html): $80/visit, most popular.
- [Monthly Membership](https://www.gospeldetailing.com/services/monthly-membership.html): $100/visit.
